scope.shape: standard (meta + entries/messages/list sections; two dynamic titles; two with inline-object entries)

necessityProof.blockerResolved: Five more managed-audit report renderers still hand-built the same title/meta/section Markdown frame.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N1 final acceptance can classify these precheck/plan/intake/dry-run reports as builder-backed.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: All five are standard shape; inline-object entries map directly to the builder's entries section, and dynamic titles map to title: profile.title.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: No new helper added. Controlled-shard-preview ProfileSection renderers (no tests) and h3-loop intake/guard renderers remain deferred.

byteIdentical.method: Proven by the five renderers' existing tests, which assert the full Markdown output and were not modified (playbook hard rule 1). No temporary compare script needed.

lint.note: 0 errors; existing warnings are tracked as N5 lint debt and were not introduced by the v2145 documentation-only closeout.
